name: Antarctica Ice Wall
description: The 'Antarctica Ice Wall' is a conspiracy theory claiming that a massive ice wall surrounds the continent of Antarctica, serving as a physical barrier preventing humanity from accessing what lies beyond, which proponents suggest could be other continents, advanced civilizations, or even the edge of a flat Earth. This theory often intertwines with the flat-Earth model, where Antarctica forms the outer rim of the world rather than a southern continent. The origins of this idea are difficult to pinpoint, but it gained traction with the resurgence of flat-Earth beliefs in the 21st century, fueled by internet forums and social media. Proponents often cite the Antarctic Treaty System, which restricts independent exploration, as evidence of a global conspiracy to conceal the true nature of the world. They also point to historical maps and accounts, interpreting them as depicting Antarctica as a continuous ice barrier. Mainstream science and historical cartography reject these interpretations. Scientific research confirms the existence of Antarctica as a continent covered in ice, but not as an insurmountable wall. The Antarctic Treaty System is explained as a collaborative effort to preserve the continent for scientific research and environmental protection, not as a means of concealing a hidden truth. The 'Ice Wall' is considered pseudoscience and lacks empirical support.
subtitle: Conspiracy theory about a hidden boundary.

claims.claim: Antarctica is a massive ice wall encircling the Earth.
claims.evidence: Interpretations of old maps and the Antarctic Treaty System.
claims.criticism: Old maps are often inaccurate or allegorical, and the Antarctic Treaty System promotes scientific collaboration and environmental protection, not concealment.

claims.claim: The 'ice wall' prevents access to other continents or the edge of the flat Earth.
claims.evidence: Lack of independent exploration permitted beyond certain areas and supposed inconsistencies in globe models.
claims.criticism: Extensive scientific exploration of Antarctica has been conducted, and globe models accurately reflect observed geography and physics.

claims.claim: Governments and secret societies are conspiring to hide the truth about Antarctica.
claims.evidence: The Antarctic Treaty System and alleged censorship of information about Antarctica.
claims.criticism: The Antarctic Treaty System is a transparent international agreement, and there is no evidence of systematic censorship of Antarctic information.

keyFigures.name: Samuel Rowbotham
keyFigures.role: Early proponent of the flat-Earth theory, whose ideas are foundational to the Ice Wall theory.

keyFigures.name: Neil deGrasse Tyson
keyFigures.role: Astrophysicist and science communicator who frequently debunks flat-Earth and related theories.

mythologyConnections: Giants guarding the edges of the world

timeline.event: Samuel Rowbotham publishes 'Zetetic Astronomy', laying the groundwork for flat-Earth cosmology.
The Antarctic Treaty System is signed, later cited by conspiracy theorists as evidence of a cover-up.
Resurgence of flat-Earth beliefs and the 'Antarctica Ice Wall' theory on the internet.

sources.author: Rowbotham, Samuel
sources.work: Zetetic Astronomy: Earth Not a Globe
sources.title: Rowbotham, Samuel

sources.author: Preston, Minnie Pearl
sources.work: Is the Bible from Heaven? Is the Earth a Globe?
sources.title: Preston, Minnie Pearl
